_comment: 가사 키워드 → 시각 장면 매핑. prompt_generator.py가 가사에서 키워드를 감지하면 해당 visual_scene을 패널 분위기에 반영.

창문.visual_scene: cute chibi skeleton gazing through a glowing rain-streaked window, neon magenta reflections on glass, soft city lights outside

밤.visual_scene: late night cyberpunk city skyline, oversized neon magenta moon glowing, cute chibi skeleton band silhouetted against the night sky

길.visual_scene: neon-lit cyberpunk street, cute chibi skeleton walking or standing, magenta glow reflecting on wet pavement

하늘.visual_scene: wide shot of dramatic cyberpunk sky with oversized neon magenta moon, cute chibi skeleton looking upward

무대.visual_scene: full cyberpunk concert stage with cute chibi skeleton band performing, neon magenta spotlights, crowd silhouettes below

눈물.visual_scene: extreme close-up of cute chibi skeleton face, single sparkling teardrop falling from glowing hollow eye socket, neon magenta glow intensifying

사랑.visual_scene: cute chibi skeleton with small heart sparkles around hollow eye sockets, warm neon magenta glow, gentle expression

이별.visual_scene: cute chibi skeleton band member walking away from stage, single backward glance, neon magenta moon behind, dramatic but adorable

그리움.visual_scene: cute chibi skeleton sitting alone on stage edge, gazing at oversized neon magenta moon, soft sparkle atmosphere

행복.visual_scene: cute chibi skeleton band jumping with joy, star and heart sparkle effects everywhere, vibrant neon magenta energy bursts

외로움.visual_scene: cute chibi skeleton standing alone center stage, single spotlight, oversized moon above, small sweat drop on skull

아침.visual_scene: cyberpunk city at dawn, neon lights fading, cute chibi skeleton band silhouette on stage against a gradient purple-magenta sky

저녁.visual_scene: sunset cyberpunk skyline with deep magenta-orange gradient, cute chibi skeleton in medium shot, warm glow on skull

계절.visual_scene: seasonal webtoon panel — seasonal effects mixed with cyberpunk neon (cherry blossoms / summer heat waves / falling leaves / snow) around cute chibi skeleton

비.visual_scene: cyberpunk city in rain, cute chibi skeleton standing in downpour, neon magenta rain drops, puddle reflections of the moon

바람.visual_scene: cute chibi skeleton with costume fabric flowing in wind, speed lines showing breeze, neon magenta particles drifting

별.visual_scene: cyberpunk night sky filled with stars and oversized neon magenta moon, cute chibi skeleton looking up with sparkle eyes

불꽃.visual_scene: cute chibi skeleton performing with neon magenta flame-like energy effects around stage, dynamic action lines, concert pyrotechnic vibe

노래.visual_scene: cute chibi skeleton vocalist at microphone, musical note sparkles floating around, neon magenta soundwave visual effects

춤.visual_scene: cute chibi skeleton band in dynamic dancing pose, cartoon motion lines and star burst effects, energetic chibi action

박수.visual_scene: crowd silhouettes cheering below stage, cute chibi skeleton band waving back, neon magenta light beams sweeping the crowd

fallback_visual.description: 키워드 매칭 없을 때 사용하는 기본 장면
fallback_visual.visual_scene: cute chibi skeleton band on cyberpunk stage, neon magenta moon above, dynamic webtoon comic panel composition

_usage_note: prompt_generator.py가 가사 텍스트에서 mappings의 keywords를 검색하여 첫 번째 매칭 항목의 visual_scene을 패널 분위기 설명에 추가한다. 매칭 없으면 fallback_visual 사용.
